_notes: Keyed by a short operator code (your own convention — GWR, AWC, etc). fleet_classes store the EXACT display label as it should appear (not a bare number + assumed 'Class ' prefix) — this covers cases like Manchester Metrolink's M5000 that don't follow the 'Class NN' pattern. 'id' is used to link through to that vehicle's entry on the database page; 'display' is shown verbatim, no reformatting. franchises is the full history; sidebar should show the current one as a simple 'Operating since {start}' line by default, with the full array available as an expandable detail.
